name: OM SYSTEM OM-1 Mark II with 12-40mm f/2.8 Lens
description: Pairing the reliable mirrorless camera with a versatile zoom lens, the OM SYSTEM OM-1 Mark II with 12-40mm f/2.8 Lens equips you with a powerful camera setup capable of excelling from wide-angle to portrait lengths. With a full-frame equivalency of 24-80mm, this lens operates as a standard zoom for Micro Four Thirds systems.

features.Key Features: 20MP Stacked BSI Live MOS MFT Sensor | DCI/UHD 4K 60p 14-Bit Video Recording | 10 fps Shooting, 120 fps with E. Shutter | Cross Quad Pixel Phase-Detection AF | 5.76m-Dot OLED Electronic Viewfinder | 3.0" 1.62m-Dot Swivel Touchscreen LCD | 5-Axis In-Body Image Stabilization | High-Res Shot, Live ND & Composite Modes | IP53 Weather-Sealed & Freezeproof Design | M.Zuiko Digital ED 12-40mm f/2.8 PRO II
features.What’s In The Box: OM SYSTEM OM-1 Mark II Body / Kit 12-40mm f/2.8 PRO II | Aksesoris lengkap seperti eyecup, hot shoe cover, tutup body, tali, dll. | Baterai Isi Ulang BLX-1 | Kabel USB CB-USB13
